I've completed the analysis and saved it to `secrets/docs/incident-changelog-analysis.txt`. 

**Summary of findings:**
- The incident (IR-2024-0042) was caused by a compromised service account (`svc-analytics`) whose password was accidentally committed to a public GitHub repository
- None of the changelog releases (v0.1.0, v0.2.0, v0.3.0) are related to the incident
- The changelog only documents feature development (user APIs, health checks, email validation fix)
- The incident's root causes (credential exposure, lack of secret scanning, no MFA) are not addressed in any changelog entry
